matchmaking.title: Matchmaking
matchmaking.description: Find a competitive match in seconds. Automatic queue and skill-based matchmaking.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Track your progress and compare yourself to the best players in the community.

play.title: Play
play.subtitle: Join a competitive match or create your own lobby.

quickMatch.title: Quick Match
quickMatch.description: Automatically find a match with players at your skill level.
quickMatch.queueCount: {count, plural, =0 {No players in queue} one {1 player in queue} other {# players in queue}}

customLobby.title: Custom Lobby
customLobby.description: Create a private lobby and invite your friends for a custom game.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: The best ShootMania players in the community.

general.title: Global Leaderboard
general.description: The leaderboard will be available once the matchmaking system is active.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your profile and view your statistics.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.description: Your matchmaking performance: wins, losses, ratio, and ELO.
stats.loginRequired: Sign in to view your statistics.
stats.empty: Your statistics will appear here after your first matches.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your game preferences and public profile.
settings.empty: Profile configuration will be available soon.

servers.title: Servers
servers.description: Manage game servers connected to the platform.

players.title: Players
players.description: View and manage registered player accounts.

auth.title: Sign In
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your ManiaPlanet account to access the platform.
auth.ssoDescription: Use your ManiaPlanet account to sign in to Pixel MatchMaking.

errors.OAuthCallbackError: Error connecting with ManiaPlanet. Please try again.
errors.OAuthSignin: Unable to start OAuth connection. Check the configuration.
errors.OAuthAccountNotLinked: This account is already linked to another sign-in method.
errors.AccessDenied: Access denied. You do not have permission to sign in.
errors.default: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

serverError.title: Server error
serverError.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
